title: scale2freq
description: convert scale into a frequency list

messages.description: scale in cents to convert to a frequency list

flags.name: -base <float>
flags.description:
sets base pitch value in MIDI
default: 60

flags.name: -range <float float>
flags.description:
sets min/max frequency range in Hz
default: 20 20000

methods.description: sets base pitch value in MIDI
sets min/max frequency range in Hz

body: [scale2freq] gets a scale as a list of cents values, a base/fundamental pitch and outputs a list of frequency in Hz between a minimum and maximum value. Below we use [eqdiv] to generate a scale. Use it to feed values to things like [resonbank~], [oscbank2~] or [pvretune~].
